rulings.Case Title: ALBERT WRIGHT JR` et al VS. A.W. CHERSTON COMPANY, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 24, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT QUINTEC INDUSTRIES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion is denied. Failure to shift burden of proof. See Weber vs. John Crane, Inc. (2006) 143 Cal.App. 4th 1433. =(302CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT WRIGHT JR` et al VS. A.W. CHERSTON COMPANY, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 24, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT IMO INDUSTRIES INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for Summary Judgment is granted. Defendant IMO shifts the burden of proof with verified responses to special interrogatories and plaintiff's deposition. Plaintiff fails to create a triable issue of fact regarding exposure to defendant's product and causation. =(302CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT WRIGHT JR` et al VS. A.W. CHERSTON COMPANY, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 24, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT BUFFALO PUMPS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion is denied. Failure to shift burden of proof by not moving to compel responses to its special interrogatories. =(302CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT WRIGHT JR` et al VS. A.W. CHERSTON COMPANY, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 24, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for Summary Jugment is granted. Defendant shifts the burden of proof. Plaintiff fails to create a triable issue of fact that plaintiff was exposed to defendant's products or those products caused plaintiffs illness. =(302CWW/JW)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 24, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANT HENRY SHINEFIELD'S DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to May 6, 2009, on the Court's own motion. =(302CWW/VC)

rulings.Case Title: JONATHAN SUN VS. INDEPENDENT TELEVISON SERVICE INC A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 24, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT INDEPENDENT TELEVISION SERVICE, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Motion for Summary Adjudication is granted. As to the Quantum Meruit cause of action, plaintiff fails to create a triable issue of fact that both parties understood plaintiff would be compenstated for the services by defendant. As to the cause of action for Intentional Interference with Prospective Economic Advantage, plaintiff fails to create a triable issue of fact that defendant's conduct was wrongful by some legal measure other than the fact of interference itself, or that defendant was an outsider that interfered with a contractual relationship that plaintiff had with Jetsen/LNTV. =(302CWW/VC)

rulings.Case Title: KEITH CHRESTIONSON VS. KAUFF,MCGUIRE & MARGOLIS, LLP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Claims And To Stay Action;
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 24, 2009, line 10, DEFENDANT KAUFF, and, MCGUIRE & MARGOLIS, LLP'S Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Claims And To Stay Action. Motion to Compel Arbitration is granted. No basis to rescind the arbitration clause. No fraud in the inducement and plaintiff does not establish unconscionability. The arbitration shall occur in New York. The dispute involves more than one partner, and the arbitration is currently pending in New York. This California action is stayed pending arbitration. =(302CWW/PB)
